title: 某科技公司总部办公空间升级
description: 负责该项目从需求分析到交付的全流程管理。协调设计团队、供应商和施工方，确保项目在预算内按时交付。通过引入模块化隔断系统，将施工周期缩短20%。
descriptionEn: Managed the full process from needs analysis to delivery for a 1500m2 open-plan office. Coordinated design team, suppliers and contractors. Reduced construction timeline by 20% with modular partition system.

title: 品牌展厅设计与搭建
description: 统筹品牌展厅从概念设计到落地的全过程。协调空间设计、展品陈列、灯光系统等多个供应商，确保展厅在行业展会前顺利开放。
results: 展会期间获200+潜在客户咨询
descriptionEn: Oversaw the brand showroom from concept to completion. Coordinated spatial design, product displays, and lighting systems. Successfully opened before the industry trade show, generating 200+ leads.
